name: book_appointment
description: Create and confirm a real booking after the customer chooses one exact staff-and-time slot returned by get_availability. Copy its slot_id exactly. Only claim success when this tool returns success true, and report the team_member_name returned by this tool.

parameters.description: Booking details confirmed by the customer.

slot_id.description: Exact slot_id for the customer's chosen team member and time, copied from get_availability. Never invent or alter it.

phone.description: Contact phone number the web customer provided and confirmed.

notes.description: Optional short notes the customer asked to add.
